title: AI/Generative AI Engineer (Oracle Fusion & OCI)
company_focus:
Enterprise AI solutions and Oracle cloud integration
services
description:
Position Overview: We are seeking a highly skilled
Generative AI / Agentic AI Engineer to build and scale
enterprise-grade AI solutions using advanced LLMs, agent
frameworks, and automation platforms. In this hands-on role,
you will design, implement, and optimize AI-powered
applications including autonomous agents, RAG-based
knowledge systems, and workflow automation that deliver
measurable business value.You will work closely with
stakeholders, product owners, AI and cloud and engineering
groups to translate business needs into secure, scalable,
and production-ready Generative AI implementations
Responsibilities:

- Hands-on expertise in building, fine-tuning, and deploying
  Generative AI applications including AI agents.
- Develop autonomous agents using OCI Generative AI and OCI
  Agentic AI frameworks studio, with exposure to LangGraph,
  Azure AI Foundry, and Google ADK as a plus.
- Design and implement RAG pipelines for accurate contextual
  responses.
- Integrate Generative AI solutions with Oracle Fusion
  applications (ERP / HCM / SCM / EPM) using OCI AI agent
  Studio.
- Automate business workflows by leveraging OCI services such
  as Functions, API Gateway, OIC, and Object Storage.
- Deploy, monitor, and optimize AI agents primarily on OCI,
  with experience on Azure/GCP considered beneficial.
- Strong concepts in machine learning and Deep Learning with
  practical experience in PyTorch, Scikit-learn, and
  TensorFlow.
- Solid backend engineering skills in Python, and experience
  with Java or NodeJS is a plus.
- Ability to design secure and scalable AI-driven
  architectures with API management and cloud-native
  patterns.
- Working knowledge of MLOps practices preferred

Requirements:


- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data
  Science, AI/ML or equivalent field.
- Overall 1–2 years in Generative AI and Agentic AI
  development.
- Good -level knowledge in Agentic AI, preferably with OCI
  Generative AI Agents, plus experience using LangGraph,
  LangChain, Google ADK, and Azure AI Foundry.
- Expert-level Python development skills, with strong
  experience in PyTorch and TensorFlow.
- Experience integrating AI with Oracle Fusion modules and
  automating functional workflows through Oracle REST APIs /
  OIC.
- Good understanding of NLP, prompt engineering, transformer
  architecture, and related techniques.
- Proven experience deploying AI solutions on OCI with
  monitoring, scalability, and cost optimization.
- Experience with Docker/Kubernetes and serverless
  architectures.
- Familiarity with SQL/NoSQL systems, vector databases, and
  retrieval systems used in RAG pipelines.
- Strong software engineering fundamentals: version control,
  code quality, testing, modular design.
- Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills with focus on
  performance, security, and cost efficiency.
- Clear communication skills with the ability to articulate
  technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
responsibilities: Build, fine-tune, and deploy Generative AI applications including AI agents
Develop autonomous agents using OCI Generative AI and OCI Agentic AI frameworks, LangGraph, Azure AI Foundry, and Google ADK
Design and implement RAG pipelines for accurate contextual responses
Integrate Generative AI solutions with Oracle Fusion applications (ERP/HCM/SCM/EPM) using OCI AI Agent Studio
Automate business workflows leveraging OCI services including Functions, API Gateway, OIC, and Object Storage
Deploy, monitor, and optimize AI agents primarily on OCI with cost optimization
Design secure and scalable AI-driven architectures with API management and cloud-native patterns
Apply machine learning and deep learning concepts using PyTorch, scikit-learn, and TensorFlow
use_cases: Autonomous AI agents for enterprise workflow automation
RAG-based knowledge systems for contextual information retrieval
Business workflow automation via OCI services
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on role focused on building, fine-tuning,
and deploying Generative AI applications, autonomous agents,
and RAG pipelines using LLMs and agent frameworks. The role
involves direct implementation work with AI models and
systems.
